frames.title: Initial fixed-budget state
frames.note: The generated ER-ER duplex starts with k1 = k2 = 3, but the two minimum driver sets are disjoint. Delta = 6 and |U| = 6.

frames.title: CLAP 1 · reveal segment 1 of 2
frames.note: Layer 1 extends the shortest feasible CLAP from 3 to 2 via 12, 14. The budgets are unchanged because the matching has not been updated yet.

frames.title: CLAP 1 · reveal segment 2 of 2
frames.note: Layer 2 extends the shortest feasible CLAP from 2 to 9 via 10, 7. The budgets are unchanged because the matching has not been updated yet.

frames.title: Apply CLAP 1
frames.note: Apply the full CLAP. Delta drops from 6 to 4, so |U| contracts from 6 to 5 while k1 and k2 stay fixed at 3.

frames.title: CLAP 2 · reveal segment 1 of 2
frames.note: Layer 1 extends the shortest feasible CLAP from 4 to 3 via 12. The budgets are unchanged because the matching has not been updated yet.

frames.title: CLAP 2 · reveal segment 2 of 2
frames.note: Layer 2 extends the shortest feasible CLAP from 3 to 16 via 5. The budgets are unchanged because the matching has not been updated yet.

frames.title: Apply CLAP 2
frames.note: Apply the full CLAP. Delta drops from 4 to 2, so |U| contracts from 5 to 4 while k1 and k2 stay fixed at 3.

frames.title: CLAP 3 · reveal segment 1 of 3
frames.note: Layer 2 extends the shortest feasible CLAP from 5 to 2 via 10. The budgets are unchanged because the matching has not been updated yet.

frames.title: CLAP 3 · reveal segment 2 of 3
frames.note: Layer 1 extends the shortest feasible CLAP from 2 to 4. The budgets are unchanged because the matching has not been updated yet.

frames.title: CLAP 3 · reveal segment 3 of 3
frames.note: Layer 2 extends the shortest feasible CLAP from 4 to 11 via 12. The budgets are unchanged because the matching has not been updated yet.

frames.title: Apply CLAP 3
frames.note: Apply the full CLAP. Delta drops from 2 to 0, so |U| contracts from 4 to 3 while k1 and k2 stay fixed at 3.
